title: norna
intro: Norna is a lesser-known plant species native to parts of Europe, Asia, and Africa, belonging to the family of plants known as the Apiaceae (carrot or parsley family). The norna plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. Its health benefits include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the norna plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
